params.name: Dragon Medal
params.description: This is a medal inherited from a noble family that has existed for thousands of years. Even though the descendants have left their homeland, their pride never wavers. They built a mighty empire by forming an alliance with dragons. Only those who wear this medal will be recognized by the dragons!
params.ss1:
Activates the Red Dragon Egg
Per 10 Dragon Minions in battle:
> Troop HARD Stats +2
